song_name: Meghan Trainor - Dear Future Husband - Olly Murs - Dance With Me Tonight
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Capo 1 


[ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]    

Dear future husband, here's a few things you’ll need to know if 

          [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]          

You wanna be the one and only all my life



(Awwwww)

[ch]C[/ch]

Take me on a date. I deserve it, babe

[ch]Am[/ch]

And don't forget the flowers every anniversary

[ch]F[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]

'Cause if you'll treat me right, I'll be the perfect wife

[ch]C[/ch]

Buying groceries, buy-buying what you need


[ch]C[/ch]

You got that 9 to 5, but, baby so do I

[ch]Am[/ch]

So don't be thinking I'll be home and baking apple pies

[ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]

I never learned to cook, but I can write a hook

[ch]C[/ch]

Sing along with me sing-sing along with me (hey)


[ch]C[/ch]

My name is Olly nice to meet you can I tell you baby

[ch]Am[/ch]

Look around there's a whole lot of pretty ladies

[ch]F[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]

But none like you, you shine so bright, yeah


[ch]C[/ch]

I was wondering if you and me could spend a minute

[ch]Am[/ch]

On the floor up and close getting lost in it

[ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]

I won't give up without a fight


[ch]C[/ch]                                     [ch]Am[/ch]    

You gotta know how to treat me like a lady

                     [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]

Even when I'm acting crazy, tell me everything's alright


              [ch]C[/ch]

I just wanna… Dear future husband, (oooooh)

             [ch]Am[/ch]

Here's a few things you'll need to know if (babyyy)

          [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]    

You wanna be my one and only all my life 

(I just want you to dance with me tonight)

            [ch]C[/ch]

So come on… Dear future husband, (oooooh)

             [ch]Am[/ch]          

If you wanna get that special lovin' (babyyy)

            [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]

Tell me I'm beautiful each and every night 

(I just want you to dance with me tonight)
